MINI MINUTES:
MICHAEL R. BRACAMONTES, ESQ. OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, P.C.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT MARJORIE DELA CRUZ).

APPEARANCES: Michael Bracamontes, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, P.C. 835-6777 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf/x-deft Marjorie Dela Cruz; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2010 Continued To Oct-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Mastuela Lucero Responses To Discovery Documents, Set One And For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kristen Ross, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: MARJORIE DELA CRUZ
Mastuela Lucero, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MARJORIE DELA CRUZ's Motion To Compel Defendant Mastuela Lucero's Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Mastuela Lucero's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Mastuela Lucero is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Request For Production, Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, and Requests For Admission within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Mastuela Lucero in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
